zh.lifeSummary: 當Gisèle de Lorraine於1090年出生在德國艾爾薩斯-洛斯林根時，她的父親Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant"46歲，母親Gertrude de Flandre21歲。她和Heinrich Graf von Tecklenburg至少有1個兒子。她去世於1160年在海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gisèle de Lorraine于1090年出生在德国艾爾薩斯-洛斯林根时，她的父亲Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant"46岁，母亲Gertrude de Flandre21岁。她和Heinrich Graf von Tecklenburg至少有1个儿子。她去世于1160年在海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Gisèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

variants.name: Gisella
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

variants.name: Gisele
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gisèle de Lorraine was born in 1090, in Alsace-Lorraine, Germany, her father, Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant", was 46 and her mother, Gertrude de Flandre, was 21. She had at least 1 son with Heinrich Graf von Tecklenburg. She died in 1160, in Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Rhineland, Prussia, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gisèle de Lorraine est née en 1090, à Alsace-Lorraine, Allemagne, son père, Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant", avait 46 ans et sa mère, Gertrude de Flandre, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Heinrich Graf von Tecklenburg. Elle est décédée en 1160, à Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Rhénanie, Prusse, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gisèle de Lorraine 1090 in Elsaß-Lothringen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant" 46 und ihre Mutter Gertrude de Flandre 21. Sie hatte mit Heinrich Graf von Tecklenburg mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1160 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Rheinprovinz, Preußen.

Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Heinrich Graf von Tecklenburg. Morì nel 1160, nel Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, all'età di 70 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Gisèle de Lorraine(이)가 1090년 독일 엘사ss-로스링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant"(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrude de Flandre(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Heinrich Graf von Tecklenburg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1160년 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 크레이스 사아르브uc켄 사아르브uc켄에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Tecklenburg, Westfalen, Preußen, Duitsla: крис теккленбург, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gisèle de Lorraine родилась в 1090 г. в местности элсаss-лотринген, Германия, её отцу по имени Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant" было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude de Flandre, 21. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Heinrich Graf von Tecklenburg. Она умерла в 1160 г. в местности саарбрuккен, крис саарбрuккен, раинпровинз, Пруссия в возрасте 70 лет.
